description:
Perform an SEO migration by creating five custom URL rewrites for the Default Store View. 

Rewrite 1: Request Path 'summer-sale-electronics' to Target Path 'electronics.html' (Permanent 301)
Rewrite 2: Request Path 'old-clothing-catalog' to Target Path 'clothing.html' (Permanent 301)
Rewrite 3: Request Path 'featured-yoga-gear' to Target Path 'yoga-mat-premium.html' (Permanent 301)
Rewrite 4: Request Path 'flash-deals' to Target Path 'sports.html' (Temporary 302)
Rewrite 5: Request Path 'legacy/home-decor' to Target Path 'home-garden.html' (Permanent 301)

Ensure all paths are entered exactly as specified.
